name: Umbramirage the Elemental Lord
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>闇</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>やみ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>霊</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>れい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>オブルミラージュ
desc: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your hand) by having exactly 5 DARK monsters in your GY. If this card is Special Summoned: Add 1 monster with 1500 or less ATK from your Deck to your hand. You can only use this effect of "Umbramirage the Elemental Lord" once per turn. If this face-up card leaves the field, skip the Battle Phase of your next turn.
mnst_eff: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your hand) by having exactly 5 DARK monsters in your GY. If this card is Special Summoned: Add 1 monster with 1500 or less ATK from your Deck to your hand. You can only use this effect of "Umbramirage the Elemental Lord" once per turn. If this face-up card leaves the field, skip the Battle Phase of your next turn.
